privileged_info_summary: The data is the real NCBI Reference Sequence NC_001401.2 (Adeno-associated virus - 2, complete genome) with an exact length of 4679 base pairs. Analysis of the NCBI feature annotations confirms the presence of inverted terminal repeats: the 5' ITR is located exactly at coordinates 1 to 145, and the 3' ITR is located exactly at 4535 to 4679. Both of these fall accurately within the expected ranges described in the metadata.
